title: Enhanced Visuals and performance - client side
description: your visuals and performance are enhanced and work on all servers, The visuals can be edited to your own preference to make your gameplay more personal and unique!
body:
## 
### > Visuals
The Enhanced Visuals and Performance modpack for Minecraft is a comprehensive modification package that focuses on elevating the game's visual quality and optimizing performance to enhance the overall gameplay experience. This modpack introduces a range of enhancements such as more immersive textures, Vanilla+ shaders, and smoother animations. By incorporating these visual upgrades, the modpack transforms the Minecraft world into a more immersive and visually stunning environment, captivating players with its enhanced aesthetics.

## 
### > Performace
The performance optimizations included in the modpack ensure smoother gameplay by utilising performance-enhancing mods, delivering a seamless and enjoyable gaming experience. Through a careful balance of visual enhancements and performance improvements, the Enhanced Visuals enrich your Minecraft gameplay smoothly, making it more engaging and captivating for players seeking a heightened level of immersion and excitement without changingg the base game.

## 
### > Server/Realm use
Because this is client-side you can use this pack on all servers and realms, check with the owners if they are okay with them being used.

##
